results.definition_en: A heavy soft grey metal; or the act of going first.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鉛；或帶領、領導。
results.example_en: The pipes are made of lead.

results.definition_en: The act of taking in knowledge.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 學習；取得知識的過程。
results.example_en: Learning a new language takes time.

results.definition_en: The skin of an animal made hard, used for shoes or bags.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 皮革；經處理變硬的動物皮，用於鞋或包。
results.example_en: Her bag is made of brown leather.
results.example_zh_tw: 她的包是棕色皮革做的。

results.definition_en: A written message sent from one person to another; or a sign in writing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 信件；或字母。
results.example_en: I got a letter from my mother.

results.definition_en: A flat state, with no part higher than another; or a step in a scale.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 水平、等級；平整無起伏，或某階段。
results.example_en: The water came up to the level of my knee.

results.definition_en: The act of taking a thing up to a higher place.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 舉起、抬升；把物品移到較高處。
results.example_en: Give me a lift with this box.

results.definition_en: The bright thing from the sun or a lamp that lets us see.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 光、光線；來自陽光或燈具、使我們得以視物的明亮之物。
results.example_en: Turn on the light, please.

results.definition_en: The point past which a thing cannot go.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 界限、上限；事物不能超越之處。
results.example_en: There is a limit to my time today.

results.definition_en: A strong cloth made from a plant called flax.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 亞麻布；以亞麻植物纖維織成的堅韌布料。
results.example_en: She put clean linen on the bed.
results.example_zh_tw: 她在床上換了乾淨的亞麻床單。

results.definition_en: A thing that flows, like water or milk.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 液體；可流動之物，如水或牛奶。
results.example_en: Pour the liquid into the cup.

results.definition_en: A row of words or things written down one by one.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 清單、名單；逐項書寫的詞或事物。
results.example_en: Make a list of what we need to buy.
results.example_zh_tw: 把要買的東西寫成清單。

results.definition_en: An act of turning the eyes to see a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 看、瞥；轉動眼睛以視物。
results.example_en: Take a quick look at this book.

results.definition_en: The state of not having a thing one had before.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 損失、喪失；不再擁有先前之物的狀態。
results.example_en: Her loss made her very sad.
results.example_zh_tw: 她的失去讓她非常傷心。

results.definition_en: A very strong warm feeling for a person or thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 愛、喜愛；對人或事物的深厚情感。
results.example_en: She has great love for her family.

results.definition_en: A thing made of parts that work together to do work.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 機器、機械；由部件組成、可動作完成工作的器具。
results.example_en: This machine cuts cloth.
results.example_zh_tw: 這台機器是用來剪布料的。

results.definition_en: An adult male person.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 男人、男性成人。
results.example_en: An old man sat by the door.

results.definition_en: A person whose work is to lead others in a job.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 經理、管理者；在工作中領導他人之人。
results.example_en: The manager will see you now.

results.definition_en: A small spot, line, or sign on a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 印記、記號；事物上的小斑點或標誌。
results.example_en: There is a mark on the wall.

results.definition_en: A place where people go to buy and sell things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 市場；買賣物品的場所。
results.example_en: I buy fruit at the market every week.
results.example_zh_tw: 我每週都去市場買水果。

results.definition_en: A big amount of a thing put together.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 團、塊；大量聚集之物。
results.example_en: A mass of clouds came over the hill.

results.definition_en: Food eaten at one time, like breakfast or dinner.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 一餐、餐食；某一次進食所吃的食物。
results.example_en: We had a big meal at noon.

results.definition_en: The act of finding how big, long, or much a thing is.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 量度、量測；測知事物的大小、長度或數量。
results.example_en: Take the measure of the room.
results.example_zh_tw: 量一下這間房間的大小。

results.definition_en: The flesh of an animal used for food.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 肉；可食用的動物肌肉。
results.example_en: We had meat for dinner.

results.definition_en: A time when people come together to talk.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 會議、會面；眾人聚集討論的時刻。
results.example_en: Our meeting is at three today.

results.definition_en: What one keeps in the mind from before.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 記憶、回憶；心中所留存的舊事。
results.example_en: I have a clear memory of that day.
